description: Hairu Ihei is a First Class Ghoul investigator and the partner of Koori Ui. She is the deputy leader of S1 Squad. description: Haruka Oozora is one of the protagonists in Harukana Receive. She first came to Okinawa because of her parents' employment and moves in with her grandmother. She is a very energetic and light-headed girl and childish to some extent, but positively straightforward where she is empathetic towards those around her.

name: Hokusai Katsushika
description: An ukiyoe artist from the second half of the Edo period. In addition to "Katsushika Hokusai", he had over 30 other pen names like "Gakyo Rojin" and "Sori". As a painter representing Japan, he had a great influence on foreign painters and musicians such as Gogh and Debussy. Known for his terribly fast brush strokes, he left behind 30,000 works in his lifetime. name: Mai Shiranui
description: Mai is a sexy, busty, spunky female ninja warrior. Renowned for her big breasts, she trains under the perverted Jubei. She's Andy Bogard's girlfriend, and she is completely obsessed with him. She can be seen in the Fatal Fury anime and games, as well as the King of Fighters manga and games.

name: Masayoshi Hazama
description: __Height:__ 183 cm A young man who acts as a model in a fashion magazine. Thanks to his grandfather who loved action heroes, he grew up admiring heroes since he was young, and then he finally makes his debut as the new hero, "Samurai Flamenco," an idea his grandfather came up with. However, his inexperience when it comes to self-defense which often led him to either be cornered or beaten by thugs whom he is trying to apprehend, but later on, he slowly learns how to fight.

name: Megumi Natsu
description: __Height:__ 145 cm Megumi is gentle and friendly with a light personality. She is sweet and always in a good mood, but she is genuinely shy about doing things before others. Although she doesn't show it off often, she is a talented ballet dancer and is noted for being really graceful.
